semantic_cell: Primary key identifying the document review state. 1=Uploaded, 2=PendingReview, 3=Approved, 4=Declined, 5=Expired. See glossary Document Status (Tier 1 — Dictionary.DocumentStatus)
Human-readable status label. Used in compliance review UI, customer communications, and regulatory reporting. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.DocumentStatus)
ETL load timestamp. Set to GETDATE() on each daily full reload by SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse. Reflects ETL run time, not source data change time. (Tier 2 — SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse)

CASE WHEN NetEquity > BonusCredit THEN BonusCredit WHEN NetEquity < 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetEquity END. NetEquity = ISNULL(TotalPositionsAmount,0) + ISNULL(TotalCash,0) + ISNULL(TotalStockOrders,0) + ISNULL(PositionPnL,0)
ISNULL(InProcessCashouts,0) + CASE WHEN NetEquity - BonusCredit > 0 THEN NetEquity - BonusCredit WHEN NetEquity < 0 THEN NetEquity ELSE 0 END
